positive: Highly detailed stylized illustration of intertwined bioluminescent fauna and flora, forming a symmetrical mandala pattern. Central subject is a whimsical, stylized forest portal opening onto a crescent moonscape. Use clean vector art style combined with engraved etching textures. Strong contrast between deep indigo, emerald green, and glowing cyan highlights. Composition must be perfectly centered and scalable for apparel printing. Clean outlines, sharp edges, and dramatic, ethereal lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, signature, text, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, blurry, low contrast, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, grain, noise, realistic, photo, deep depth of field
